creator: rometravelers
caption:
See history, taste the flavors, feel the rhythm with @ruanlage this is Rome!🎶🍕

💡Explore Ancient Wonders: Visit the Colosseum, Roman Forum, and Palatine Hill — where history literally comes to life.

💡Marvel at Iconic Landmarks: Admire the Pantheon, Trevi Fountain, and St. Peter’s Basilica in Vatican City.

💡Wander Historic Streets: Stroll through Trastevere, Piazza Navona, and Campo de’ Fiori for charming squares, artisan shops, and lively cafes.

💡Indulge in Italian Flavors: Taste authentic Roman pizza, creamy cacio e pepe, and gelato at local favorites across the city.

💡Museum & Art Treasures: Don’t miss the Vatican Museums, Galleria Borghese, and countless hidden galleries filled with Renaissance masterpieces.

💡Sunset Views & Parks: Relax at Villa Borghese Gardens or enjoy panoramic views from Gianicolo Hill at sunset.

What would you do first in Rome? 🍷🏛️👇

📍Rome 🇮🇹
